title: Apple moves on from Cosmic Orange as leaked iPhone 18 Pro dummy units reveal new Dark Cherry finish
snippet: Apple is set to replace the Cosmic Orange variant with a new Dark Cherry color for the iPhone 18 Pro series. Other colors variants for the flagship phone could include Black, Silver, and Light Blue.

title: DigiLocker, BHIM, Rail Madad and more: 12 govt-backed apps worth having to save time and reduce paperwork
snippet: From DigiLocker and UMANG to BHIM, ABHA and Rail Madad, these 12 government-backed apps help users access documents, make payments, manage health records, book train tickets and use public services online, reducing paperwork and saving time in everyday tasks.

title: Meta is building a new AI pendant designed to record and transcribe your daily conversations: Report
snippet: Meta plans to launch an AI pendant to recover losses in its Reality Labs division. The device is said to use the technology from Limitless, the AI startup that the company bought last year.

title: Free Mac Mini? Perplexity is sending Apple's desktop to some creators: Here's why
snippet: Perplexity is gifting Mac Mini computers to select creators to try out its new Personal Computer feature. The move comes amid rising demand for Mac Minis due to the need for localized AI computing power to run AI agents.

title: AI chipmaker Nvidia set to enter PC market with first Windows computer in collaboration with Microsoft: Details
snippet: AI chipmaker Nvidia is set to make its official entry into the PC market and unveiling its first Windows PCs powered by its own processors in collaboration with Microsoft. The launch is expected next week and could bolster Microsoft's AI PC ambitions with more local, on-device AI capabilities

title: The memory shortage is just beginning. The consumer pain is already here.
snippet: Memory prices for PCs, smartphones, and gaming consoles are spiking. Consumers will bear the brunt of the inflation.

title: Tired of checking your phone constantly? These smartwatches handle calls and fitness better
snippet: Modern smartwatches now combine Bluetooth calling, heart rate tracking, SpO2 monitoring and long battery life, making them more useful for busy daily routines and fitness tracking.

title: Huawei bets on speed over shrinking transistors to sidestep US chip sanctions

title: Cloud war intensifies as Google ties enterprise deals to in-house AI
snippet: Sashikumar Sreedharan, managing director of Google Cloud India, admitted that it still remains early days for India’s push to enforce sovereign cloud adoption at scale. As a result, Google’s own sovereign cloud offering has also remained limited in terms of its revenue contribution.

title: Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT to Gemini: The AI productivity tools reshaping office work in 2026
snippet: From Microsoft Copilot and Google Gemini to ChatGPT, Slack AI and Notion AI, workplace software is rapidly becoming AI-native. These tools now draft documents, summarise meetings, automate workflows and retrieve company knowledge directly inside the apps employees already use daily.

title: Delhi HC ruling against Google draws praise from startup founders
snippet: The Delhi High Court has ruled Google liable for trademark infringement in keyword advertising, a decision lauded by Indian startup founders like Nithin Kamath and Sridhar Vembu. title: AI may impact "lucrative job market linked to IT services": EY report
snippet: Artificial Intelligence will significantly reshape India's skilled workforce and its IT sector. EY's report highlights potential job market shifts. title: PB Fintech founders Yashish Dahiya, Alok Bansal sell 0.8% stake worth Rs 665 crore
snippet: The shares were acquired by investors including Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Hong Kong-based Viridian Asset Management, Kotak Securities, Tata Mutual Fund, National Pension System Trust, and other domestic and foreign portfolio investors. The transaction was executed at Rs 1,751 per share.

title: AI to reshape hiring and work in India, but 'human ownership' key as confidence outpaces global peers: ACCA
snippet: India's workforce is rapidly embracing AI at work and in hiring, with adoption expected to accelerate as organizations redesign roles around automation, ACCA said in its latest survey.

title: Hollywood studios and actors' union find common ground on AI
snippet: As Hollywood's performers cast their ballots to approve the latest negotiated contract, union leaders say they have made some progress in conversations with studio bosses since the massive strike in 2023, especially when it comes to concerns about artificial intelligence.

title: EU wants to break up with US tech
snippet: Wary of being vulnerable to the whims of foreign governments, the European Union is preparing far-reaching new moves to ditch American digital companies and Chinese chips in favour of European alternatives.
